programme.title: Short Sheeped
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King, which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots set up base at an old auto-parts shop.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An engineering genius tampers with Bumblebee's system and causes him to become Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream goes on a quest for Red Energon while a new Autobot joins Team Prime: but is he what he seems?

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Silas is given a bizarre new lease on life, and approaches Megatron with a plan to join the Decepticon ranks.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Jack pairs off with Smokescreen to further educate him about navigating the human world.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots learn of the Omega Keys and the incredible secret they hold.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An accident causes the Dinobot Grimlock to become a super genius.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Technobots encounter a conniving smuggler.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons steal the Autobot Matrix of Leadership.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons locked the planet Zamojin in a space-warp and isolated it from the rest of the universe.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Return of the Optimus Prime, Part 1
programme.desc: Scientists infects Autobots and Decepticons with a plague that will pit them against their own kind.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Return of the Optimus Prime, Part 2
programme.desc: The hate plague rapidly spreads among robots and humans on Earth.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Golden Tresses: Hogatha, the repulsive witch, captures the Smurfette. She wants to steal from the little blue beauty her golden hair. Can the Smurfs save their little female companion before it is too late? Can Hogatha grow hair like Smurfette's?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Three Smurfketeers: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf A Mile In My Shoes: The Smurfs band together to retrieve a sea-shell they need to release a hermit imp from the Sea Witch, as she cursed him with ugliness and a language very few understand. The Smurfs return with the sea-shell in time to break the curse and return the hermit to the handsome imp he once was.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Last Whippoorwill
programme.desc: There are poachers in the Duke of Bedford's forest. They almost succeed in catching the Whippoorwill that lives there... But worse than that, the Duke's son, Chauncey, finds the bird's egg and takes it to the castle for his collection. The Whippoorwill is not doing its insect-eating job anymore, and gnats, mosquitoes, bugs of every type abound. Can the Smurfs restore the Whippoorwill's egg to be nest?

programme.title: Symbols Of Wisdom
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf desperately wants to be more like Papa Smurf. Can a hair tonic be the answer? Can Gargamel be able to finally capture the Smurfs? Does wisdom really reside in a beard?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - It's A Puppy's Life: The evil wizard Gargamel has got hold of magical ectoplasmic crystal eggs that will enable him to change bodies with Papa Smurf. What better plan could there be? Disguised as Papa Smurf, he's going to lead all the Smurfs to his cauldron! But as fate would have it, Gargamel is changed into Puppy, the Smurf doggie...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Prince And The Hopper: What is that strange talking frog that Morlock the Wizard sends all of Prince Theodore's soldiers to catch? Is it a demon frog, as he says, or something else? Truth will out when Smurfette and the Smurflings meet the frog. They help to change this frog back into Prince Theodore himself, for he's been the victim of a spell cast by Morlock.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: To Smurf A Thief
programme.desc: The Smurfs and Homnibus befriend an unfortunate boy who is forced to steal for his master. Soon, the evil thief is turned over to the magistrate and the boy is happy to live with Homnibus.

programme.title: How To Smurf A Rainbow
programme.desc: Mother Nature is too busy to conjure a rainbow for the Smurfs' festival, so Papa Smurf borrows her cookbook and mixes up the recipe himself. As there is no yellow available, they use the leprechaun's gold to produce a beautiful rainbow before Gargamel can steal it.

programme.title: A Bell For Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel puts a spell on a bell attached to Azrael's tail that will lead the cat to the Smurfs. Papa Smurf outwits him with a counter-spell that leads the wizard to Big Mouth instead of the tasty Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Flowers: It's not every day you meet a talking flower. Especially not a character like Petaluma, a somewhat haughty bulb flower who Smurfette meets in the forest. Of course the delighted Smurfette takes Petaluma to the Village of the Smurfs... and starts a process that is going to endanger all of the Smurfs. Flowers, it seems, ought to be seen and not heard.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Puppy: Homnibus gives the Smurfs a dog that they name Puppy. The playful, normal-sized animal likes his new home, but Balthazar captures him, thinking that the Smurfs' magical secrets are in Puppy's collar. The Smurfs rescue the dog and Baby finds only music in the collar's locket.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Unsound Smurf: In an effort to give Papa some quiet time, Brainy uses one of Papa's spells to create a magical sound barrier around the village. Papa cannot reverse the spell and sends the Smurflings, who are trapped outside the Village, to a noisemaker. Baby takes a bottle of sound from the noisemaker, which breaks the barrier.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Every Picture Smurfs A Story: The evil Maestro's magical paints have the power to transport his models onto canvas – forever! Papa Smurf directs Painter to switch his paints and before long, Maestro is enshrined in a picture next to his dream girl, Smurfette.

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: The Rabbids land at the North Pole.
programme.desc: Taking pity on a pack of frozen fish, the rabbids decide to set it free and embark on a risky mission.

programme.title: The Rabbids are misunderstood artists.
programme.desc: By accident, the rabbids destroy the teleporta-TV.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: Rabbids experience.
programme.desc: In a laboratory, the Rabbids are subjected to tests designed to determine just how idiotic they really are.

programme.title: The Rabbids have a great plan.
programme.desc: Four rabbids find a wooden horse and tries to make it move by all means, while drawing Zak's attention.

programme.title: The Rabbids have to be cunning.
programme.desc: After his pals seemingly managed to reach the moon, a rabbid fins himself alone in the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids invade the ice pack.
programme.desc: Mini Rabbid accidentally swaps places with a baby penguin.

programme.title: The Rabbids' Treasure Hunt.
programme.desc: An Explorer Rabbid heads off to the Ice floe in search of treasure.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: The Rabbids are fed up!
programme.desc: Amazed by a dog scratching himself, the Rabbids approach him, and get the dog's fleas.

programme.title: The Rabbids are moving.
programme.desc: A Rabbid has fun playing a game where he suddenly jumps out of a box to surprise his friends.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too. (S1 E10)

programme.title: Get Blake
programme.desc: Blake must master playing a wooden fish for a battle-of-the-bands performance with Skye. Followed by Sixty Second Dennis.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part I
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: Who Do You Think You Are
programme.desc: Rumor has it that Queen Aleena's journals are buried in the city of Tashistan. Sonic and his siblings search the city for the scrolls.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: A Hedgehog's Home Is Her Castle
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Jungle Jump
programme.desc: Welcome to the jungle and the 6th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers take on cranky crabs and hungry sharks as they make their way through this tropical obstacle course.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Garden Gauntlet
programme.desc: The competition grows and the gamers meet their 7th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players get lost in this hectic hedge maze.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Booty and the Beast
programme.desc: Kaptain Skurvy and his crew invade Kongo Bongo Island and keep Donkey Kong and Diddy in their ship and tries to steal the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: SONIC X Little Chao Lost
programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are at a camp site where they discover a Chao colony. Meanwhile, Dr. Eggman is also hiking nearby and decides to launch an attack when he encounters Sonic.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Sweet Escape
programme.desc: The competition is down to the final four! Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers run through this sugary sweet obstacle course for the chance to become the ultimate gamer.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Dune Dash
programme.desc: The top three gamers meet in the desert to race their way into the finale. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players battle the sand, snakes, and scorpions in this cactus race course.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Barrel, Barrel... Who's Got the Barrel
programme.desc: Bluster tries to impress Candy by getting a ridiculous toupee, but when that doesn't work, he tries to steal the Crystal Coconut. Meanwhile, King K. Rool tries to build a spy satellite.

programme.title: SONIC X Emerald Anniversary
programme.desc: Chris' father Nelson purchases a ring made from a Chaos Emerald for his wife Lindsey. Being made aware of its presence, Dr. Eggman attempts to snatch the emerald away from them.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Rainbow Rumble
programme.desc: The top two gamers meet head-to-head in the final challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players race to the finish line to be crowned the ultimate gamer!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Meet the Gamers
programme.desc: Host Frankie view gets to know the Kidaverse Roblox Rumble gamers. Get to know their awesome personalities and strategies for the competition.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Kong for a Day
programme.desc: When King K. Rool and his cronies framed Donkey Kong for wrongdoing with his friends, it works even better than they expected Cranky banishes Donkey Kong to the White Mountains and Diddy replaces him to become the future ruler.

programme.title: SONIC X How to Catch a Hedgehog
programme.desc: After an encounter with Dr. Eggman, Sonic finds himself unable to stop running. Chris and his grandfather Chuck soon discover that Eggman's E-88 is behind Sonic's problem.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble KC Raceway
programme.desc: Join the gamers in their first challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers race to victory and earn their first round of points

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Yeti Set Go
programme.desc: Things get chilly as the gamers snowball into their second challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the kids battle the yetis to make it to the top of the icy mountain.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Raiders of the Lost Banana
programme.desc: Donkey Kong finds a golden banana inside Inka Dinka Doo's temple and gives it to Candy, but the banana contains a curse that causes havoc for whosoever keeps it and brings bad luck to the island.

programme.title: SONIC X A Dastardly Deed
programme.desc: Chris finds himself depressed at the prospect of his friends returning to their home world despite knowing that it is what's best for them. Meanwhile, Knuckles attempts to orchestrate a truce between Sonic and Eggman so that they can all return home.

programme.title: Nurse!
programme.desc: Mr Bean discovers being in hospital isn't always a bed of roses.

programme.title: Dead Cat
programme.desc: Mr Bean has to replace his landlady's cat after an unfortunate ‘accident'.

programme.title: Super-Trolley
programme.desc: Mr Bean builds a supermarket super trolley.

programme.title: Magpie
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets in a complete flap when he befriends a feathered thief.

programme.title: Cat-Sitting
programme.desc: Mr Bean is forced to look after his worst enemy.

programme.title: The Bottle
programme.desc: Mr Bean loses his bottle.

programme.title: Goldfish
programme.desc: Mr Bean nearly gets fed to the fish!

programme.title: Inventor
programme.desc: A brand new lodger in the house could be a great new friend, or could be your worst enemy.

programme.title: Car Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean takes to the air after being taken for a ride.

programme.desc: Mr Bean makes a meal out of his Birthday celebration.

programme.desc: Mr Bean tries his hand as an international art sleuth.

programme.title: Scaredy Bean

programme.title: Hot Date

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: An escaped prisoner suffers hard labour under Mrs Wicket while Mr Bean puts his feet up in jail.

programme.title: Gadget Kid
programme.desc: High-tech wizardry and low-tech cunning get Mr Bean out of a jam.

programme.title: The Visitor
programme.desc: Mr Bean learns that generosity can be an effective weapon against greed, gluttony and getting your hands back on your own TV remote control.

programme.title: Big TV
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes to buy the biggest TV in the world only to find that it has a price-tag to match.

programme.title: Keyboard Capers
programme.desc: Determined to play the piano, Mr Bean finds a tune in his heart and sausages for fingers.

programme.title: A Running Battle
programme.desc: Mr Bean runs rings around the town.

programme.title: Egg and Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean is 'storked' by an unwelcome visitor.

programme.title: Hopping Mad!
programme.desc: Mr Bean finds that tons of toads weigh loads and loads.

programme.title: A Grand Invitation
programme.desc: Mr Bean is all at sea with the landed gentry.

programme.desc: Mr Bean redecorates his room, making it fit for a Queen.

programme.desc: Mr Bean gets green eyes and green fingers.

programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes smitten with a beautiful singer.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean meets a soul mate.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean attempts to make his own home movie – a horror thriller with Mrs. Wicket as the star!

programme.desc: Irma wants a romantic break Bean doesn't. It's too expensive.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

Who should emerge as the town's only possible saviour but Dennis Cooper (Michael Palin), an endearingly witless bumpkin who stumbles onto the scene and is flung into the role of brave knight.

programme.title: Permanent
programme.desc: Prep-hair to scale frizzy heights in this feel-good, coming of age 80s comedy, starring Patricia Arquette (Boyhood) and Rainn Wilson (The Office). Having moved to small town Virginia, the Dicksons are just about making it through the day (amidst life's chaos)! To add to the mayhem, 13 year-old Aurelie desperately wants a new hairstyle to fit in with her peers, but accidentally ends up with a perm!

programme.title: Deathsport
programme.desc: Futuristic Science Fiction about a sport to the death, using destructocycles.

programme.desc: Amber and Kyle are ready to move on after a car accident two years ago. But their world turns upside down when Jessica, the other driver who lost her unborn baby in the accident, moves in next door and gets a job with Amber's doctor - all in a plan to seek a cold form of revenge.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: Push

programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Godsend

programme.title: Godsend

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist must stop a devastating earthquake from ripping the Earth apart.

programme.title: James Cameron's Deepsea Challenge
programme.desc: Filmmaker James Cameron ventures to the bottom of the sea, capturing never-before-seen vistas and creatures.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must confront a terrifying monster when they break down on a deserted road.

programme.title: The Legend of Barney Thomson
programme.desc: Comedy drama as Robert Carlyle plays Barney Thomson, a downtrodden barber who has fallen from grace in his meagre barbering life. One day whilst almost losing his job, Barney comically falls into the unthinkable role of a serial killer. As he sweats out his predicament, and attempts to clumsily cover his tracks, a police detective investigating a series of murders in the area begins to suspect Barney may not be all he appears to be. All the while Barneys mother Cemolina cheerfully emasculates her son, setting off a bloody chain of events.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Arriving at a rambling, isolated house for her first nightshift, young carer Emily is left alone to face a terrifying vengeful spirit.

programme.title: Adventures of a Taxi Driver
programme.desc: Joe likes the ladies and gets to meet a variety of them in his job as a taxi driver. From dizzy young women to frustrated housewives, Joe fancies them all, and they take a fancy to Joe. If only things were smoother at home for the put-upon cabbie. With his nagging mother, thieving teenage brother, and the attentions of an overbearing girlfriend with ideas of marriage, Joe leaves the homestead and rents the spare room at his best mate's flat. Meanwhile, he continues to find himself in an assortment of humorous sexual escapades until he accidentally becomes embroiled in a jewel heist that doesn't quite go to plan.

programme.title: There Are Monsters
programme.desc: There Are Monsters is a feature length horror based upon the apocalyptic premise that the world is being taken over - slowly, quietly and efficiently - by creatures that look exactly like us. The story follows a graduate-student film crew who, on a work-related road trip, discover evidence of these doppelgangers.

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job
programme.desc: A remarkable true story of the largest heist in English legal history. Four ageing East End criminals led by 76 year-old Brian Reader (Larry Lamb) drill into a steel-and-concrete secured safety deposit vault in Londons Hatton Garden jewellery quarter. With everyone from the Hungarian mob to Scotland Yard on their tail, will they commit the crime of the century or pay with their lives?

programme.title: Death of Me
programme.desc: A dream vacation in the South Pacific becomes a torturous nightmare in this high stakes horror from director Darren Lynn Bousman (The SAW Franchise). Christine (Maggie Q - Fantasy Island) and Neil (Luke Hemsworth - Thor: Ragnarok) awake on their dream vacation to a hangover and no recollection of the night before. The only clue to the horrors that transpired is a tape of Neil killing Christine.

programme.title: Initiation
programme.desc: Carefree partying turns sinister in this edgy slasher that sees Whiton University unravel on the night a star-athlete is murdered in the wake of a buried assault allegation. As a masked killer targets students, a trio of sorority sisters race to uncover the schools dark secrets. Starring Yancy Butler (Kick-Ass), Lochlyn Munro (Riverdale) and Jon Huertas (This Is Us).

programme.title: The Void
programme.desc: Enter this blood-soaked nightmare at your own risk. When police officer Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted road, he rushes the man to a hospital, only to discover a horrifying reality all linked to the mysterious hooded cult figures who are surrounding the hospital. Now Carter must lead the survivors on a hellish voyage in a bid to survive! Totally mind-bending!

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: Nights and Weekends
programme.desc: In her directorial debut, Greta Gerwig stars as Mattie, a New York resident who over the course of a year desperately tries to navigate through the struggles of a long-distance relationship with her partner, James, who lives in Chicago.

programme.title: Granada Nights
programme.desc: A British tourist is stuck in Granada, Spain with a broken heart. Feeling lost and abandoned, he befriends a group of young foreigners and crashes into the heart of the international student scene.

programme.title: Comet
programme.desc: Comet explores the six-year relationship between Dell and Kimberly, as it skips around between five pivotal moments.

programme.title: W.E
programme.desc: The affair between King Edward VIII and American divorcée Wallis Simpson and a contemporary romance between a married woman and a Russian security guard.

programme.title: Marilyn Hotchkiss Ballroom Dancing & Charm School
programme.desc: A widowed man's life turns upside down when he embarks on a journey to find a dying man's long lost love.

programme.title: For The Love Of Grace
programme.desc: After Grace Harding is saved from a fire by Steve Lockwood, a widowed firefighter, they teach each other to embrace life as they fall in love.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: A lonely widow plans a trip around the world with her husband's ashes, to visit the places they loved in the movies. The first stop on the journey changes her life forever.

programme.title: Sincerely, Yours Truly
programme.desc: When Hayley finds a wedding ring with a letter hidden in a drawer in her new condo, she decides to write back… and the mysterious lover replies, starting a chain of letters and events that will change her life for ever!

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion which might be the prescription this doctor needs.

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.desc: Philadelphia critic suspects cheating husband, hires investigator with own agenda.

programme.desc: Original idea by LMN & Harlequin uncovers Thornwood Heights' murder secrets.

programme.desc: True story: Newlywed dies on honeymoon, husband's guilt investigated.

programme.title: 'Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: Philadelphia critic suspects cheating husband, hires investigator with own agenda.

programme.desc: Three angels bestow the gift of song to a young girl, who must follow a series of rules in order hold on to it during her rise to fame and fortune.

programme.title: A Moving Romance
programme.desc: After inheriting her family's moving company, a young woman starts to clash with the manager who thought he was going to take over.

programme.title: A Moving Romance
programme.desc: After inheriting her family's moving company, a young woman starts to clash with the manager who thought he was going to take over.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Pete and DeeDee have an announcement for the Gamma brothers. Across campus, Sarah struggles with her new living situation.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Most leave for break, while a few stay behind. Rick is pushed to his breaking point and flips out on Allison.

programme.title: Mr. Write
programme.desc: When editor Dori meets her idol, romance novelist Michael, she's crushed to learn he doesn't really believe in true love. But with both of their careers on the line they are forced to work together to make his next book a success. As the project takes shape, Dori inspires Michael in a way that revives his faith in love and the two get a chance at their own happy ending.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A newly engaged woman makes a wish that her fiancee take the planning of their wedding seriously, and to her surprise and dismay, her wish comes true.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2

programme.desc: Shanda is charged with the murder of the banker, Burton and to save her from being lynched, the sheriff sends her off to Phoenix. During the trip the two deputies to whom she's been entrusted rape and leave her in the desert, certain that she's dead. The girl is found by Black Talisman, an outlaw, who takes her to his hideout, nurses her back to health and after hearing her story, determines to avenge her and clear her name.

programme.title: Hour of Death
programme.desc: Bob Carey, fresh out of jail, goes in search of his fiancée and soon learns that she has married a wealthy farmer.

programme.title: Geordie

So he takes a correspondence course in body-building, becoming one of the tallest and strongest men in Scotland and an expert at throwing the hammer.

programme.title: IT'S NOT CRICKET
programme.desc: Major Bright and Captain Early are planning to capture a fugitive Nazi who has stolen the famous Rothstein diamond and hidden it in a hollow cricket ball. As Bright and Early search for the Nazi, will they realise they have the valuable cricket ball?

programme.desc: The scene is Freetown, Sierra Leone, in the year 1942. Harry Scobie, Deputy Commissioner of Police, is nearing the end of 15 years' exemplary service. Scobie is a remarkable man - honest, upright and industrious. His chief failing is a passionate pity for the unhappy, the oppressed and the weak and it is this pity which causes him to commit his first offence and leads to his ultimate downfall.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy and Ty reach a difficult decision about their future, the Heartland family grapples with the implications of their choice. Meanwhile, Georgie and Jade convince Tim to hire them to work at Maggie's, and Ty and Amy work together to save Casey's barrel racing horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Cass work together to save a racehorse with a career-ending condition, while the arrival of a former girlfriend forces Tim to see his current relationship in a new light. Meanwhile, Georgie's attempt to help Olivia backfires when it threatens Adam's campaign for class president. And Jack's missing cell phone creates a rift with Lisa.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie's school project on Val Stanton inspires her to take a risk with Adam. Meanwhile, a shocking announcement from Caleb makes Ty question why Amy hasn't told him some important news. And Jack hires new help for Heartland after a close call puts several horses in danger.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou returns from New York she is forced to confront two interlopers: Heartland's new ranch hand, and a trendy food truck that is threatening Maggie's business. Meanwhile, Amy struggles to help a challenging client regain her confidence. Then, after Georgie insists that she and Adam are nothing more than “friends,” she is devastated when she sees him at a party with another girl. And Tim makes a difficult decision about his future.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou finds herself trapped at the Dude Ranch with Mitch, the new ranch hand, and they both reveal the circumstances of their recent pasts. While helping Amy treat a client horse, Ty feels conflicted about opening a mysterious package that has ties to his troubled past. And Jack and Lisa cope with a health scare, while Georgie and Adam deal with the fallout from Adam's kiss with another girl.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: While trying to help Cass learn to handle a spirited horse, Amy discovers there is more riding on their success than she initially realized. Meanwhile, Tim insists the entire Heartland family attend a Hudson holiday party where Lou is forced to deal with a series of unexpected events, not the least of which is Peter's sudden appearance. When tragedy strikes at the Wildlife Reserve, Georgie risks her life to save a herd of miniature horses and Ty steps in to offer support when Bob's dream of expanding the Reserve goes up in smoke. Meanwhile, when Remi destroys his new fly-fishing bait supplies, Jack holds onto his grudge against the dog in order to win a bet with Lisa.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When their plans to get away are thwarted, Amy and Ty celebrate their first anniversary closer to home and Amy unveils a special surprise. Meanwhile, Peter lobbies for a reunion forcing Lou to make a difficult decision about her and her family's future. While her parents grapple with their decision, Georgie has to act quickly on a trail ride when she learns a secret about Adam that leaves his life hanging in the balance. And Ty steps up to convince the devastated Bob to reconsider when he decides to throw in the towel at the Wildlife Reserve.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: As Amy and Ty prepare for parenthood, they work together to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue. Meanwhile, Georgie may be forced to give up something she loves when a demanding new Extreme Team coach arrives on the scene. Then, Lou has to decide whether she should tackle a new business venture that may take her away from the Heartland family. When Jack and Mitch work together with the herd, Tim is not ready to be pushed aside. And Georgie and Adam find the perfect way to celebrate an anniversary.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Princess Catherine: A New Kind of Queen
programme.desc: Princess of Wales, and Prince William are revolutionizing the royal family by raising their modern family

programme.title: Diana: Queen of Hearts
programme.desc: Close friends, family and world leaders profile the life of Diana, the Princess of Wales.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Covering: When our ancestors saw how other animals kept warm in sub-freezing temperatures, they started hunting them for their hides and fur. As hominid evolution was diverging from other primates, they lost their thick covering of fur when the mercury dropped.

programme.title: Born to Fly
programme.desc: We envy birds, watching them enjoy the freedom of a 3 dimensional space. Flight allows them to get to hard to reach places and preform aerial acrobatics in protecting home ranges and searching for food.

programme.title: Deserts On The Move
programme.desc: Deserts On The Move - Asia: China and India are the world's two most populous countries. They are also burdened with two of the most famous ‘hot' deserts - the Gobi desert in Mongolia-China and the Thar desert in India-Pakistan. Most people do not think of China as a desert nation - and yet it is among the world's largest. A staggering third of China's land area, 2.5 million square kilometres, is useless sand.

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Darkness over Egypt: For a long time, scientists have tried to prove that nine of the Ten Plagues described in the Old Testament point to a serious breakdown of the climate, triggering an ecological chain reaction. Apart from theological considerations, scholars all over the world have studied individual phenomena, trying to explain the causes of this Biblical disaster.

programme.title: Signs of Evil
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS, Hitler's Schutzstaffel, stands for terror and the murder of millions. The penniless graphic artist Walter Heck was given the job of designing the jagged, rune-like characters in 1929. The “sig” rune was rooted deep in the ideological cosmos of the Nazis and their supporters. They saw themselves as the descendants of the Teutons and declared the runes to be humanity's original Germanic script. The symbol was meant to unite Heinrich Himmler's “Black Order.” But did it escape their notice that it was originally of Semitic origin? In October 1945, the Allies passed a law banning the Nazi Party and all associated organizations, including the SS. The young Federal Republic even forbade all Nazi symbols. This documentary tells the gripping story of the SS symbol, from the Middle Ages to the present day.

programme.title: Monsters and Myths
programme.desc: Monsters have always been part of our nightmares and fairy tales. But where do they actually come from? How much of them is truth, how much is myth? Going to great lengths in this documentary, the filmmakers join scientists to explore a number of the best known sagas and legends in the world.

programme.title: Expedition Wallacea
programme.desc: 150 years ago Alfred Wallace used his observations on Indonesian islands to develop a theory of evolution independently of Darwin's. Now Matthias Kopfmüller's team want to add to Wallace's work: can the undersea evidence explain what Wallace found on land? What Wallace had recognised is that within a single island group there seemed to be a barrier that species could not pass.

programme.title: Episode 3: The Industrial Revolution And Modern Warfare
programme.desc: How do prehistoric forests link to the development of steam engines, and the rise of modern industry?

programme.title: Wind
programme.desc: This film follows the race to generate vast power from thin air - the wind. One of the world's biggest windfarms is being built off the English coast.

programme.title: Aviation
programme.desc: The way we fly is about to change, driven by a new breed of aviators not afraid to think differently. Could the days of the jet age be numbered?

programme.title: Fusion

The film focuses on Charlotte's life, interweaving the dramatic experiences of other Tsarinas. Love, power, and tragedy mark their paths amidst European politics.

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Bucketlist Europe
programme.desc: Europe is a densely packed continent, with some 700 million residents living across 50 countries. It's famed for its ancient cities and civilisations, but is sometimes overlooked when it comes to the natural world. But there's no doubt that the continent is a treasure trove of natural beauty, a mosaic of landscapes each filled with their own unique animal communities. If you were planning a bucket list trip of the natural wonders of Europe, you'd only have to ask yourself one question: where would you start?

programme.title: Bucketlist South America
programme.desc: One of the biggest continents crammed with adventures and possibilities, South America should be up there on any wildlife watcher's bucket list. From record breaking rivers and longest mountain ranges to the steepest waterfalls and most massive rainforests, the variety of landscapes supports a seemingly endless diversity of wildlife. Here you can find the biggest rodents, otters and parrots, with unique mammals and marine life and spectacular predators. Make sure you don't miss South America!

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Upon arrival in Zimbabwe, Kristina Guberman heads to Hwange National Park - renowned for it's impressive elephant herds. She learns about these gentle giants, encounters cheetah on foot and chances upon a cheetah hunt with her guide, David.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to the Mana Pools National Park with guide Craig van Zyl. They come across mating lions, have close encounters with bull elephants and canoe just meters away from imposing hippos and crocodiles on the mighty Zambezi River.

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Bucketlist Europe
programme.desc: Europe is a densely packed continent, with some 700 million residents living across 50 countries. It's famed for its ancient cities and civilisations, but is sometimes overlooked when it comes to the natural world. But there's no doubt that the continent is a treasure trove of natural beauty, a mosaic of landscapes each filled with their own unique animal communities. If you were planning a bucket list trip of the natural wonders of Europe, you'd only have to ask yourself one question: where would you start?

programme.title: Bucketlist South America
programme.desc: One of the biggest continents crammed with adventures and possibilities, South America should be up there on any wildlife watcher's bucket list. From record breaking rivers and longest mountain ranges to the steepest waterfalls and most massive rainforests, the variety of landscapes supports a seemingly endless diversity of wildlife. Here you can find the biggest rodents, otters and parrots, with unique mammals and marine life and spectacular predators. Make sure you don't miss South America!

programme.title: The most spectacular change of seasons
programme.desc: This film explores Central Europe and presents the nature from a perspective you have never seen before. Fascinating landscape footage in high-quality HD technology, coupled with spectacular Cineflex aerial views, take us on a journey through the hitherto unknown blazes of colour of the Central European region and its inhabitants. We show you paradise on earth and demonstrate how climate and astronomy determine our life cycle. While seasons change, we visit several different European habitats that - in their diversity, are exemplary of a Central European region. Mountains, water, forests and meadows: we return to each of these habitats at different times of the year and show how the rhythm of life of each of our protagonists follows nature's clock. The four seasons determine all of the coming and passing away a highly complex interplay in the universe of life. We explore the wondrous worlds of the mysterious cycle of nature together with extraordinary people. Breathtaking landscapes enable us to experience the change of seasons at first hand.

programme.title: The Last Paradises
programme.desc: This foray through northern realms of our planet above the polar circle takes us to a part of our world especially affected by climate change. The often-cited adaptability of animals could also enable them to survive under new conditions. The camera team made this foray through the polar region, from Canada to Norway, to document that, which in the opinion of many nature researchers, will no longer be visible in 30 to 50 years' time. Following the observation of ice bear mother with her young in Canada's Wapusk National Park at Hudson Bay, is a herd of harp seals on the ice during the breeding season. The Arctic Ocean ringed seals in Hudson Bay, on the other hand, prefer solitude. Should the offspring be born in an extremely cold night, they often freeze to death. Their bodies sink to the seabed at the beginning of spring when the pack ice thaws. Scavengers like the rare Greenland shark, who sees them as a welcome snack, quickly eats them. Underwater footage of this process also attempted by our camera team, very rarely succeeds.

programme.title: The Last Paradises
programme.desc: On the wild coast of Patagonia, the nature calendar describes the most diverse visiting times of fascinating animals, from the southern right whale and other large whales, via the sea lions and elephant seals up to the orcas and millions of penguins. The encounters with whales and their babies are spectacular. Hardly anywhere else on earth can one experience both the brutal and the delightful sides of nature so vividly and so close. The trip to the hot spots for animal watchers and researchers leads us inter alia to the Caleta Valdez. This is where, during the mating season, the southern elephant seals bring their babies into the world, mate and enjoy a little sunbathing on the beach.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen of the North
programme.desc: No other owls are capable of surviving the extreme conditions, whereas the snowy owl is able to hunt through six months of bright sunshine and six months of twilight. This film follows a pair of snowy owls as they breed on the tundra of the High Arctic, 300 miles inside the Arctic Circle. Lemming numbers are low this year. Five owlets hatch and they face a struggle if any are going to survive.

programme.title: Rewilding: Back to Nature
programme.desc: Worldwide, there are various projects and approaches to give nature more space again. The aim is to create larger wilderness areas that develop with hardly any influence of humans - by reintroducing so-called key animal species and creating a network of wilderness corridors across entire continents. Rewilding promises to be a cost-effective form of conservation in which we can boost biodiversity and protect the climate.

programme.title: Follow Your Cat
programme.desc: Follow us while we follow cats on their hunting grounds for mice and birds. Experience the double life of your domestic tiger... she will lead you on adventures that you never thought were possible. With a behavioural scientist that specializes in cats and modern technology we follow the cat on their wanderings into the wild. She maps their routes, unveils their secret favourite places, chronicles their territorial conquests, and shows us the entertaining habits of this enigmatic creature.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.The lions' new home will be a sanctuary on the edge of Dinokeng, a South African game reserve spanning 18,000 square metres. The huge task ahead includes planning and designing the new enclosures, and securing permits to move the animals. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!

programme.title: Lucky in Love
programme.desc: Danny and Mara try their luck in the Flip Side of Florida, Jacksonville.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson explores the adventurous side of St. Petersburg Clearwater, Florida Charleston, South Carolina and Juneau, Alaska.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh embark on a fun-filled voyage through The Upper Peninsula of Michigan to experience the Sea Songs of the Great Lakes. Adventure is abound as they trek through lush forests, stunning waterfalls and even explore a historic shipwreck. Along the way, they meet folk legends Dan Truckey and Lee Murdock, who introduce them to the captivating world of sailors' tunes. From Lake Ballads to Sea Shanties, their journey culminates at the treasured Hiawatha Folk Festival, where campfire songs and communal vibes celebrate the region's enduring charm.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Known as the quintessential party music, Polka is alive and evolving in the great city of Milwaukee. At the beloved festival of Germanfest, Polka Hall of Fame legend Peggy Mueller showcases her traditional roots while The November Criminals share their fusion of polka and hip-hop, making it clear there is something for everyone. From buttonboxes to beers and brats, this is a city full of personality and a deep love for its musical heritage.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh visit Lafayette, Louisiana where they take a deep dive into Zydeco music and local crawfish with Grammy-winning musician Chubby.

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: Near Colorado National Monument, Raheim teaches amateur weightlifter Jaime how to leverage her strength on the Millennium Falcon, a red sandstone overhang. In Rabbit Valley, they rip through epic desert trails on off-road vehicles. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: At Lunch Loops, Raheim keeps young actor Shaquille on his toes as they conquer switchbacks, rock gardens, and steep drops. They also SUP in the nearby Colorado River and dig into delicious local eats at Bin 707. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: In mile-high alpine forests near Grand Junction, Raheim encourages IT analyst Bill to get back on the bike following an accident that left him with multiple broken bones. They also ride ski lifts, kayak lakes of snowmelt, and sip lavender gin. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: Touring Delaware, Raheim pushes Tatyanna to her limits above the trees before coming back to the ground to get a little history lesson and a fantastic local brew. And in this episode of firsts, Raheim is on his own to catch some waves. (S1 E08)

programme.title: Epic Idaho
programme.desc: Photographer Chad Case and videographer Jonathan Conti take you on an epic adventure through Idaho.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Hawaii
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Hawaii, going beyond the typical tourist destinations to sample authentic Hawaiian cuisine, including poi, octopus, wild boar organs and even Spam.

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: Local Exploring on the edge of the world as Josh is on the artic Svalbard archipelago to explore in and around Barentsburg and the Arctic Ocean.

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: From Tirana, capital of old Soviet satellite Albania, Josh starts another local adventure filled with bunkers, a hidden hospital and diving in a pirate's cave.

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: Epic Exploring is going local again as Cody adventures in Lüderitz, Namibia going off the beaten path, through the desert and on to the ghost town of Pamona.

programme.title: Journey Within
programme.desc: Marilia explores Costa Rica, connecting with nature at Zunya, experiences a cacao ceremony with the Maleku Tribe, and finds wellness in Tamarindo's Cala Luna. At La Senda, she learns to appreciate nature's beauty and the importance of slowing down.

programme.title: Journey Within
programme.desc: Marilia's Irish journey, meeting land enthusiasts, explored scenic spots, encounters with Ellie and Hazel, vegan delights at Cornucopia, and concluded with a reflective sunset in the Wicklow Mountains, highlighting a strong community spirit.

programme.title: Journey Within
programme.desc: Marilia's Bali journey, focused on purification rituals, blended culture, healing, and adventure. From Tirta Empul's cleansing to exploring Ubud, embracing nature, and local traditions, she found serenity, capturing precious moments in her odyssey.

programme.title: Destination WA
programme.sub-title: Monkey Mia's Dolphins and Carnarvon's History
programme.desc: Welcome to Destination WA! Discover WA's stunning coast, from Monkey Mia's dolphins to Carnarvon's space history. Join us for an unforgettable WA Day weekend!

programme.title: Destination WA
programme.sub-title: Coral Coast's Marine Park and Perth Sites
programme.desc: Welcome to Destination WA! I'm Chrissy Morrissey. Join us as we explore the Coral Coast's Marine Park, iconic islands, and historic Perth sites.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan embarks on a two wheeled journey over the highest roads in the world, stopping in remote monasteries to learn the secrets of Buddhism's warrior demons and track down a secreted manuscript rumored to explain the lost years of Jesus.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: From the pink city to the blue city, our host weaves his way through citadels, dunes and temples in this legendary frontierland of kings. He braves the rat temple in search of the lucky albino rodent and hears the epic of cow hearding Gods.

programme.title: 7 Days
programme.desc: Kevin travels to Switzerland and has 24 hours to go from Zurich to the Swiss mountains, while Jalou finds an exciting way to go from Cannes to Corsica.
